{
  TestAssembly_OrderStatus.OrderStatusMachine.g.cs:
using DesignPatterns.Behavioral;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    public static partial class OrderStatusMachine
    {
        public static global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus InitialState { get => OrderStatusTransitionTable.Instance.InitialState; }

        public static bool TryTransition(global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus current, global::TestAssembly.OrderTrigger trigger, out global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus next) => OrderStatusTransitionTable.Instance.TryTransition(current, trigger, out next);
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.StateTransitionGenerator
,
  TestAssembly_OrderStatus.OrderStatusTransitionTable.g.cs:
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using DesignPatterns.Behavioral;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    public sealed class OrderStatusTransitionTable : ITransitionTable<global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus, global::TestAssembly.OrderTrigger>
    {
        private static readonly ITransitionTable<global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus, global::TestAssembly.OrderTrigger> Table = new TransitionTableBuilder<global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus, global::TestAssembly.OrderTrigger>().WithInitial(global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus.Draft).Add(global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus.Draft, global::TestAssembly.OrderTrigger.Submit, global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus.Submitted, guard: global::TestAssembly.OrderStatusMachine.CanSubmit).Add(global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus.Draft, global::TestAssembly.OrderTrigger.Cancel, global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus.Cancelled).Add(global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus.Submitted, global::TestAssembly.OrderTrigger.Cancel, global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus.Cancelled).Build();
        public static OrderStatusTransitionTable Instance { get => new OrderStatusTransitionTable(); }
        public global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus InitialState { get => Table.InitialState; }

        public bool TryTransition(global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus current, global::TestAssembly.OrderTrigger trigger, out global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus next) => Table.TryTransition(current, trigger, out next);
        public IReadOnlyList<global::TestAssembly.OrderTrigger> GetAllowedTriggers(global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus current) => Table.GetAllowedTriggers(current);
        public bool CanTransitionFrom(global::TestAssembly.OrderStatus current) => Table.CanTransitionFrom(current);
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.StateTransitionGenerator

}
